_meta.description: Active ticker watchlist — tickers with deep intelligence coverage

PROP.thesis_summary: Distressed DJ Basin E&P trading at 15% of NAV ($2.22 vs $6.80 NAV at $65 oil). Peers trade at parity or premium. Survival bet — SPA financing amendment closed April 7, production scaling toward 28K Boe/d, 3000% revenue growth in 2025. If survives, discount collapses. At $90 oil NAV ~$15, at $100 oil NAV ~$30.
catalysts: NAV discount narrows as survival probability rises

NTR.thesis_summary: Largest potash producer with global nitrogen/phosphate exposure. Fertilizer prices surging (urea +34% MoM, +48% YoY) while NTR lags the commodity move. CF Industries pulling exports to keep nitrogen domestic tightens global supply further — NTR captures full export pricing. EW wave 3 starting off .236 fib retracement ($43 low to $85 high). Starter position at $73, scale on weekly close above $78-80.
key_risks: Fertilizer price spike proves transient (Hormuz resolution)
Global demand destruction at elevated nitrogen prices
CF export ban lifts, supply floods back
catalysts: Continued fertilizer price escalation (urena, potash, DAP)
CF export restriction persisting through planting season
Weekly close above $78 confirming wave 3 break
NTR.source_attribution: Tracy Alloway/CF export story, ZeroHedge fertilizer report, MG EW/fib analysis

ATH.TO.thesis_summary: Canadian oil sands/duvernay E&P with 38K boe/d production, scaling to 63K by 2030 (+66%). Growth is infrastructure-driven, not price-dependent. Free cash flow compounding at any WTI. Referenced by @joeblough1970/@RazorOil.
catalysts: Free cash flow inflection as production scales

NVO.thesis_summary: Incumbent GLP-1 maker disrupted by compounding/DTC (HIMS). Revenue growth -7.6%, PEG 4.27. Testing 200-month MA at $40. Weekly DeMark Red 5 — no timing signal until ~July. Watch for count 11-12 + fundamental inflection before entry.
key_risks: GLP-1 pricing erosion from compounding pharmacies
NVO.pair_note: HIMS already held — NVO would pair disruptor WITH incumbent (hedge dynamic)
